name: TikTokLive
author: Bluscream (bluscream_)
short: Monitor TikTok lives, stream audio to VC, and mirror chat.
description: Automatically joins a voice channel when a linked TikTok streamer goes live, streams the audio, and mirrors the live chat to the channel's text chat.
install_msg: TikTokLive cog installed! Use `[p]tiktok` to configure.
